**Job Title:** Chief Nursing Officer (CNO)

**Location:** Dubai, UAE  
**Employment Type:** Full\-time

**Job Summary**

The Chief Nursing Officer (CNO) is a senior leadership role responsible for the strategic direction, management, and overall performance of nursing services within an acute care hospital. The CNO ensures the delivery of high\-quality, patient\-centered care, compliance with regulatory standards, and alignment with the hospital’s mission and objectives.
